surface_appearance: one short sentence fragment about disagreement
actual_function: fused disagreement marker plus clipped tarjih lead-in
risk_if_misplaced: A fused and clipped unit will hide the difference between unbiased disagreement marking and attribution-critical preference.

segment_label: واختلف العلماء في حقيقة اليد التي تقطع على أقوال:
surface_appearance: opening clause of the same sentence
risk_if_misplaced: The issue may lose its clean status as a known site of disagreement.

surface_appearance: mere continuation of the disagreement sentence
risk_if_misplaced: The scholar's preferred view is flattened into generic disagreement material.

segment_label: بل نقل فيه الإجماع، من أنها الكف التي تبتدئ من الكوع،
risk_if_misplaced: The tarjih remains clipped or gets falsely treated as complete when it is not.
